creator: raimeetravel
caption:
I just love when you can FEEL that someone truly loves and enjoys their job 🥹 These small moments and extra kind interactions make a huge difference (especially when flying as a nervous flyer!) shout out to Moll from @delta for being such a joy onboard my flight from CDG to SEA!

I used one of my 4 Global Upgrade Certificates - a perk I get for being Diamond Medallion - to upgrade to Delta One and it was one of my favorite flights ever!

Let me know if you want a video about all the ways I get business class seats (I’ve never everrr purchased one in full!) 

#businessclass #deltaairlines #traveltips #dreamjob

transcription.text: How you doing? I'm going to try. Isofono? Isofono. So close though. Oh, I see. Well hey, thanks for being a diamond. Thank you. I really appreciate it. You look too young to be a diamond. You know, I work in the travel industry. I'm 31. Oh my gosh, you look great. You look great. So do you. I have a port pre-order for you. Yes. Do you remember that? Yes. Okay. Sounds good. And if you wanted to change it, just let me know. Okay, cool. We've got you, okay? Amazing, thank you.
